title: Senior Staff Engineer, Tech Lead
description:
• Leading a team of 6, including 1 data engineer, 4 full stack developers and 1 test engineer, specializing in Full stack development and Snowflake data platform technologies.
• Design, develop, and maintain backend services and RESTful APIs using Node.js and TypeScript.
• Design, develop and maintain frontend components written in ReactJS and automation using Playwright and TestCafe.
• Build and manage serverless applications with AWS Lambda and API Gateway.
• Integrate and manage data storage solutions with MongoDB, DynamoDB, and Amazon S3.
• Implement event-driven architectures using Amazon EventBridge.
• Monitor and optimize application performance using New Relic, Splunk, and CloudWatch.
• Develop and maintain infrastructure as code (IaC) using AWS CDK.
• Driving data governance, overseeing analytics projects, and delivering actionable insights through reporting.

title: Software Engineer
description:
Part of OCHS - Oracle Cerner Healthcare Solutions.

Led the migration of a Node.js, React, and GraphQL Data Warehousing project from MongoDB to CouchDB for cost reduction, while concurrently executing a lift-and-shift to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure from traditional On-prem hosting.

• Developing web services and front-end web components utilizing the following technologies: JavaScript, React, GraphQL, Node.js, Express.
• Collaborating with functional and design experts, as well as other technical leaders across the organization to define project requirements, technical design, and estimates.
• Evaluating, enhancing, and documenting development processes that impact multiple teams.
• Mentoring new software engineering associates on standard development processes, troubleshooting techniques, and development culture.

title: Software Design Engineer
description:
• Building robust microservices architecture using NodeJS, Amazon API Gateway, AWS S3, AWS RDS, and Docker.
• Crafting efficient frontend web components with ReactJS and Redux for seamless user experiences.
• Developing middleware solutions utilizing SignalR to facilitate real-time data acquisition from Biomedical devices such as Electric Safety Analyzers, Defibrillator Analyzers, Gas Flow Analyzers, Patient Simulators, and Infusion Device Analyzers.
• Automating build and deployment processes through the development of Cake and Wix scripts.

title: Associate Senior Software Engineer
description:
• Develop web services and front-end components with JavaScript, React, GraphQL, Node.js, and Express.
• Work with teams to outline project needs, technical designs, and estimates.
• Enhance development processes across teams and document improvements.
• Guide new software engineers in standard practices, troubleshooting, and fostering development culture.

title: Software Engineer
description:
• Worked as part of the application development team, contributing to team projects and developing applications and services.
• Identified and implemented improvements to development processes to improve quality, reduce costs, and shorten delivery timelines.
• Provided technical assistance relating to developed applications.

title: Software Development Senior Associate
description:
• Worked on the rewrite of application from VB6 to MERN.
• Ensure the best possible performance, quality, and responsiveness of applications.
• Developed custom modules & interfaces in MERN technologies.

title: Software Development Intern
description: Trained in NodeJS and ReactJS and developed a web application for the company using these technologies.
